allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
perf: optimize AI response speed and fix context bleeding bug

- Stream tokens word-by-word \(yieldEveryNTokens: 3→1\) for smoother display
- Add translator package for fast Nepali/English translation \(no AI needed\)
- Fix chat context bleeding: clear other Gemma sessions on chat load
- Remove 1.8s forced splash delays for instant app startup
- Remove redundant model loading in chat screen
- Remove background warmup that competed with user inference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
